title: linum narbonense var. reflexum
intro: Linum narbonense var. reflexum, also known as reflexed flax, is a variety of the Linum narbonense plant, a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Linum narbonense var. reflexum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds are often used to create salves, ointments, and infusions, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
